channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Damaged and Potholed Crossover outside 156/158 Petts Wood Road, 2nd April
item.description:
Multiple potholes and broken surface on crossover caused from multiple utilities works and vehicles doing 3 point turns

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 165, Petts Wood Road, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped fridge, 2nd April
item.description:
Fly tipped fridge in alley (by plonk golf) between martello street and mental re terrace. has been there since sunday 29/03 - was upright but has now been vandalised and there are large shards of glass all over road and pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Martello Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Corner of Chichester road, 2nd April
item.description:
Fly tipping TV cabinet

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chichester Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Refuse collectors have left un-emptied bin in road, 2nd April
item.description:
For some reason the refuse collectors have pulled this bin out of its housing and left it, overflowing, in the road. Foxes will now rummage in the bin and scatter litter everywhere. Please can this be resolved urgently.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Park Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On the junction of St Pauls Wood Hill and Leesons Hill, 2nd April
item.description:
The junction is becoming very dangerous due to the number of pot holes. The northern side of Leesons Hill at the junction with St Pauls Wood Hill. When cycling from the A208 I am having to go onto the opposite side of the road to avoid the pot holes, when proceeding towards Highfield Road. The resurfacing at this junction has lasted less than five years. Definitely not value for money, two nights road closed and two diverted bus routes.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 281, Leesons Hill, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 34 Hartland road nw6, 2nd April
item.description:
Residents of the building dumped furniture and boxes.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hartland Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Tag, 2nd April
item.description:
Tag on electrical box

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 135, High Street, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge pile of rubbish and waste, 2nd April
item.description:
Huge pile of rubbish - commercial and household items down side of 61 Oldhill Street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Feldman Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car has been sat outside my house for weeks., 2nd April
item.description:
Filthy Honda Accord in terrible condition, left on the street outside of 58 The Avenue. Still has an old paper style road tax disc in the windscreen, even has greenery growing out of the gaps between the panels. Clearly abandoned and has not moved in over a month.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Avenue, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Forest bike, 2nd April
item.description:
Abandoned forest bike

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandford Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Reporting again - communical bin not emptied for two weeks, 2nd April
item.description:
Tihs has been reported previously but ignored - the large communal bin, overflowing and surrounded by rubbish needs emptying urgently.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Church Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on bus shelter near bus stop R and SH, 2nd April
item.description:
There’s rascist abusive graffiti on the bus shelters bus stop R and SG plus near Kent Rd facing the boat pond on the billboard which needs removing asap Piease . I think it’s best to check all the bus shelters from R + SG right up to the high street because this isn’t nice to see .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sevenoaks Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on corner, 2nd April
item.description:
More fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hoxton Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Thames Water checked the drain by the corner of Weston Road ( no 63) by Mooreland Road and said it requires cleaning by the council, 2nd April
item.description:
Drain very smelly ?? Sewage type smell reported to Thames Water who inspected all the drains just now using a camera and believe the gulley needs cleaning

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28, Mooreland Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: New LED light fitted recently, 2nd April
item.description:
Hello I just wanted to check this light was fitted recently and I was wondering is there something missing like a cover? I thought it would be much brighter. it seems to get a lot of light to the left and right but not much in the middle.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bliss Crescent, Lewisham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog waste, Tyres St, SE1, 2nd April
item.description:
Please clear dog waste

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13-56, Tyers Gate, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Fly Tipping on Street problem has been found, 2nd April
item.description:
Some items have been fly-tipped where the WEE bank and Traid bank use to be

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Downs Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped items, 2nd April
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Church Manorway, Abbey Wood
